phases.gloss: pull the relevant subgraph before reasoning
measure topology (κ) — retrieve in one pass, or deliberate
deliberate along fault lines, then mutate the graph and the world
update confidence from outcomes and prediction-error surprise
merge, decay, and crystallize at idle — κ falls over time

rings.label: Governed
rings.note: every phase runs under permissions, audit, and three autonomy levels

rings.label: PULSE · the clock
rings.note: declares the loop's phases, cadence, and cross-loop signals

rings.label: PRISM · the gauge
rings.note: measures how well the loop performs over time

rings.label: SCOPE · the bounds
rings.note: bounds where agents may act over shared space
